overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a dark fantasy RPG showing an armored character walking through a snowy, foggy mountain pass toward an ancient stone archway. The atmosphere is cold and desaturated with light snowfall and mist swirling around the ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain pass with ancient stone ruins

agents.ego_description: armored character walking steadily through deep snow toward a distant stone archway

entered.detail: ancient stone archway with circular top, covered in snow and moss
tall rocky cliff face with snow patches and dark stone
tall rocky cliff face with sparse snow and vegetation
snow-covered path with visible footprints and mist drifting
ruined stone structures visible through the archway opening

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desaturated, foggy mountain pass with an armored character walking away from the camera toward a distant stone archway. The path is flanked by tall rocky cliffs and covered in snow, with mist swirling around the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching stone archway in misty mountain terrain

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the archway with round shield visible on back, passing snow-covered vegetation

entered.detail: small leafless tree with snow-covered branches
wind-blown snow accumulation on the left side of path

segments.scene_description: As the character approaches closer to the stone archway, the rocky cliffs loom larger on both sides and a small bare tree becomes visible on the right. The archway grows to dominate the center of the frame while mist continues to drift across the snow-covered path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desaturated mountain pass that gradually narrows as it approaches an ancient stone archway. It begins with an armored character walking away from the camera along a snow-covered path, flanked by towering rocky cliffs and swirling ground mist. As the character advances, the surrounding cliffs loom larger and more imposing on both sides, while a small, bare tree emerges from the fog on the right. The scene then shifts its focus as the distant stone archway grows to dominate the center of the frame, with the drifting mist continuing to veil the frozen terrain.
